items.name: Trousers
items.description: To be worn by sworn officers of Virginia Beach County Sheriff's Office. Any person found wearing these, who are not a member of the department will be banned and blacklisted. All officers are to wear the uniform of the correct rank, if you have issues, contact the Sheriff.
items.searchText: trousers to be worn by sworn officers of virginia beach county sheriff's office. any person found wearing these, who are not a member of the department will be banned and blacklisted. all officers are to wear the uniform of the correct rank, if you have issues, contact the sheriff. virginia beach county sheriff's department clothing pants emo jobs
